spec_match.rationale: Compares CSS zoom and transform scale side-by-side, illustrating layout vs paint differences perfectly.

interactive.rationale: Features a brilliant live bounding rect measurement tool that runs in requestAnimationFrame.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully aligned with the core feature distinction defined in the feature index.

edge_cases.rationale: Visually contrasts layout-affecting growth against composited scale overlap.

references.rationale: Properly references the ChromeStatus entry and MDN zoom page.

design_system.rationale: Strictly adheres to CSS variable guidelines and general button specifications.

summary: An outstanding comparative concept showcasing the exact layout-aware behavior of zoom vs transform: scale, featuring an active DOM measurement script.
